title: 70.3% report career advancement but 46.2% saw no pay increase
summary: 70.3% of designers report career advancement in the past year, with soft skills leading growth: 64.3% increased project influence. However, 46.2% saw no pay increase despite career progress. Overall career satisfaction is moderate at 42.1% rating highly satisfied.
methodology: Self-reported career progress types, compensation changes, and satisfaction ratings in anonymous online survey
